ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_name" TEXT /* Name of the game (e.g., Jacks or Better, Deuces Wild) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the game rules and features */,
  "min_bet" REAL /* Minimum bet allowed in the game */,
  "max_bet" REAL /* Maximum bet allowed in the game */,
  "min_coins" INTEGER /* Minimum number of coins allowed in the game */,
  "max_coins" INTEGER /* Maximum number of coins allowed in the game */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the game was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the game was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payouts" (
  "payout_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payout structure */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the payout structure belongs to */,
  "hand" TEXT /* Type of hand (e.g., Royal Flush, Straight Flush) */,
  "payout_1_coin" INTEGER /* Payout amount for a 1-coin bet */,
  "payout_2_coins" INTEGER /* Payout amount for a 2-coin bet */,
  "payout_3_coins" INTEGER /* Payout amount for a 3-coin bet */,
  "payout_4_coins" INTEGER /* Payout amount for a 4-coin bet */,
  "payout_5_coins" INTEGER /* Payout amount for a 5-coin bet */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payout structure was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payout structure was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payout_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payouts_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the player */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for player login */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player account was last updated */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the player's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_history" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game played */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who played the game */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "bet_amount" REAL /* Amount bet by the player */,
  "win_amount" REAL /* Amount won by the player */,
  "coins_played" INTEGER /* Number of coins played */,
  "payout_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payout structure applied */,
  "game_result" TEXT /* Result of the game (e.g., win, loss, push) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id", "player_id", "game_date"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_history_payout_id FOREIGN KEY ("payout_id") REFERENCES payouts ("payout_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player session */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who started the session */,
  "session_start" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session started */,
  "session_end" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session ended */,
  "total_bet" REAL /* Total amount bet by the player during the session */,
  "total_won" REAL /* Total amount won by the player during the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_sessions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who made the payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method used to make the payment (e.g., credit card, bank transfer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "withdrawals" (
  "withdrawal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each withdrawal */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who made the withdrawal */,
  "withdrawal_date" TEXT /* Date the withdrawal was made */,
  "withdrawal_amount" REAL /* Amount of the withdrawal */,
  "withdrawal_method" TEXT /* Method used to make the withdrawal (e.g., bank transfer, check) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("withdrawal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_withdrawals_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_stats" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "total_games" INTEGER /* Total number of games played */,
  "total_bets" REAL /* Total amount bet on the game */,
  "total_wins" INTEGER /* Total number of wins */,
  "total_losses" INTEGER /* Total number of losses */,
  "total_payouts" REAL /* Total amount paid out */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)
